---
name: Research Request
about: Request competitive analysis, market research, or structured investigation
labels: research
---

## Research Question
<!-- The single question this research must answer -->
<!-- Example: "What are the top 5 AI pipeline orchestration tools and how do they compare to Orchemist?" -->


## Scope
<!-- What's in scope? What's explicitly out of scope? -->
<!-- In scope: -->
<!-- Out of scope: -->


## Output Format
<!-- What should the deliverable look like? -->
<!-- Options: competitive matrix, synthesis report, structured analysis, summary + recommendations -->


## Key Sources to Check
<!-- Specific tools, companies, papers, or URLs to investigate -->


## Depth Required
<!-- How thorough? -->
<!-- Options: quick scan (1-2 hours), standard (4-6 hours), deep dive (full day) -->


## Questions to Answer
<!-- Specific sub-questions the research must address -->
1. 
2. 
3. 


## Confidence Requirements
<!-- What claims need citations? What's the minimum confidence score? -->
<!-- Example: "All competitive claims need direct source URLs. Min confidence: 0.7" -->


## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Research question answered with evidence
- [ ] All major competitors/sources covered
- [ ] Claims have citations
- [ ] Synthesis includes actionable recommendations
- [ ] Confidence scores meet minimum threshold
